show_ssid.label: Show SSID
show_ssid.description: Show the connected network name next to the glyph

show_signal.label: Show signal strength
show_signal.description: Show the signal percentage next to the glyph

notify_events.label: Notify on connect/disconnect
notify_events.description: Send a notification when WiFi connects or disconnects

hide_when_off.label: Hide when WiFi is off
hide_when_off.description: Hide the widget entirely while the radio is disabled
